evidence_summary: PG-062 formalises the already-working Edit Lead page (apps/web/src/app/leads/[id]/edit/page.tsx) and delivers its two missing named artifacts via a BEHAVIOUR-PRESERVING extraction (PG-059/PG-061 precedent): components/leads/lead-editor.tsx (LeadEditor — the edit form, moved from the page) and lib/leads/change-tracker.ts (pure computeLeadChangeset + buildLeadUpdatePayload — dirty-detection + a MINIMAL-PATCH update payload of only changed fields). The page is thinned from 505 LOC: it keeps getById + the api.lead.update mutation + cache invalidation + toast + redirect + breadcrumb, and composes <LeadEditor leadId lead isSaving onSave onCancel />. SCOPE GUARDRAIL: NO create/edit unification (IFC-230 owns that) — the edit form stays consistent with NewLeadForm (inline inputs), not a diverging redesign; the form contract is preserved (edit edits estimatedValue dollars<->cents; the 'unset' rule is create-only; no annualRevenue field added). 'History maintained' is satisfied by the existing backend writeLeadActivityLog on lead.update (lead.router.ts:898) — no FE history added. Zero backend/domain/schema change (no packages/, apps/api/ files touched), so /stoa-domain is trivially satisfied. a11y-expert pass: PASS-WITH-NITS — decorative lock + spinner icons aria-hidden (net-new); two pre-existing 1.3.1 label nits + 3 nice-to-haves filed as #411.

dependencies_verified.claim: Lead Detail delivered; edit route reachable
dependencies_verified.method: PG-061 Completed on main; lead-list.tsx:518 + leads/[id]/page.tsx:2749 onEdit → /leads/{id}/edit

No backend change; minimal-patch reduces payload; api.lead.update contract unchanged
Render-neutral extraction; full LHCI deferred per PG-061.

notes: Scope: web-layer only — behaviour-preserving extraction, no backend/domain/schema change. Strategy mirrors PG-059/PG-061. Plan-reviewer subagent (adcafe3c) returned CHANGES_REQUIRED and all findings were resolved: (a) buildLeadUpdatePayload applies the dollars->cents multiply INSIDE the changed-fields loop (so an unchanged estimatedValue is never multiplied) with explicit tests for unchanged/cleared/negative/non-numeric; (b) corrected the existing-test count to 7 it() blocks (not 8); (c) LeadEditor renders <form onSubmit> (not a <div>) so the page test's closest('form') still resolves; (d) added a phone-as-object seed test for coverage; (e) PAGE owns the toast (spec table corrected). The change-tracker minimal-patch is outcome-equivalent to the old send-all-fields (unchanged fields are server no-ops; cleared text/tags -> undefined/omitted = same as today) and keeps the payload test green (objectContaining id+firstName). handleSubmit uses `seededSnapshot ?? EMPTY_FIELDS` (no uncovered early-return line). a11y-expert verdict PASS-WITH-NITS: decorative lock + progress_activity icons aria-hidden (net-new, contained); two pre-existing 1.3.1 Level-A label nits (read-only email semantics, status/source badge label association) + 3 nice-to-haves (Save aria-busy, page error-icon aria-hidden, breadcrumb aria-current) filed as #411 per Rule 8 (not regressions — moved verbatim). Edit page.tsx is an app page.tsx, excluded from diff-coverage by the PG-061 parity fix now on main, so the 2 new source files carry the coverage (100% lines). The pre-commit sonar-guard flagged buildLeadUpdatePayload cognitive-complexity (19 > 15) → fixed narrowly by extracting a transformField() helper (per-field dollars->cents / tags-split / trim), behaviour identical and fully covered by the change-tracker tests. Final gate is scripts/pre-ship.mjs (mirrors CI).
